calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Edward C. Singer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Personality Hotels, LLC, dba the Steinhart Hotel.
Peter Friedman, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Alexei Lukban.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 16, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Personality Hotels, LLC, dba the Steinhart Hotel, and against defendant Alexei Lukban as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $21,076.61.
Holdover Damages - $9,647.82.
Costs - $345.00.

Total - $34,069.43.

Additionally, plaintiff Personality Hotels, LLC, dba the Steinhart Hotel, is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 952 Sutter Street, Apartment #502, San Francisco, CA 94109. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
